jobs.description: Project Overview CHT Solutions is a premium Home Theatre and Hi-Fi retailer in Australia. We are transitioning from a "copy-paste" product catalog to a high-performance, structured data model. We need an expert to build a robust Metafield and Metaobject-based architecture that enables advanced layered navigation (filters) similar to Crutchfield or major electronics retailers. The Challenge Our current listings lack structured data. Customers cannot effectively filter for technical specs (e.g., "9.4 channel receivers," "Dirac Live support," or "8K/120Hz compatibility"). We need to move away from using Tags for filtering and implement a scalable Custom Data system. Scope of Work Data Schema Design: Audit our core categories (AV Receivers, Projectors, Speakers, Subwoofers) and define a standardised Metafield schema for each. Metaobject Implementation: Set up Metaobjects for "Brands" to store reusable data (Warranty info, Brand Logos, Support links) across all products. Advanced Filtering: Implement and configure a professional filtering app (e.g., Smart Product Filter & Search or Boost AI) or optimise the Shopify Search & Discovery app using the new Metafield data. Bulk Migration Strategy: Create a CSV/Notion mapping template so our internal VA can backfill data into the new structure without breaking the site. Performance Optimisation: Ensure the new filtering logic does not impact page load speeds or create SEO "filter-bloat." Requirements Shopify Expert: Deep knowledge of Metafields, Metaobjects, and Liquid. Data Strategy: Proven experience building complex product filters for technical catalogs (Electronics, Automotive, or Industrial). SEO Mindset: Understanding of how to handle canonical tags and indexation for filter pages. AV Knowledge (Bonus): If you know the difference between Atmos and Auro-3D, or Gain on a projector screen, you are our ideal candidate. Application Question (Must Answer) "If a product belongs to two categories with different technical specs for example, a Powered Speaker that is both a 'Bookshelf Speaker' and an 'Active Speaker', how would you structure the Metafields to ensure relevant filters appear for both?" $1000 is a placeholder budget, come up with your own to suit the brief
jobs.title: Shopify Data Architect – Technical AV Catalog & Layered Navigation Setup

jobs.description: **About Us** Client is a plant‑based skincare brand on Shopify. Our flagship products have only a handful of reviews (4–10 each). We’d like to grow that to **50+ genuine, photo‑rich reviews** without resorting to paid or fake tactics. **What You’ll Do** * Audit our current review flow (Shopify + Judge.me, emails sent via Mailchimp). * Propose the simplest plan to move each core SKU from \~4 reviews to 50 within 3 months. * Execute: set up or tweak email/SMS requests, segment customers, and follow up politely. * Respond to new reviews (thank‑you or escalate low ratings) twice a week. * Track and report progress so we can see what’s working. **Success Looks Like** * ≥ 50 total reviews on each flagship product, with at least 20 % including a photo. * No breaches of UK DMCC or US FTC rules (incentives disclosed, no rating‑gating). * Clear weekly metrics: emails sent, open %, click %, review count gained. **Ideal Experience** * Hands‑on **Judge.me** and **Mailchimp** experience. * Proven lift in review volume for another Shopify store (please show numbers). * Comfortable writing friendly, on‑brand replies to customers. * Familiar with basic GDPR/CMA/FTC compliance for review incentives. **To Apply** 1. Share a link or short summary of a past project where you boosted review collection. 2. In one sentence, tell us the first action you’d take to hit 50 reviews quickly but organically. 3. State your hourly rate and typical weekly availability. **Budget & Hours** Flexible—tell us what you need to deliver the goal within 3 months.
jobs.title: Shopify VA / Review‑Growth Consultant — Help Us Reach 50 Organic Product Reviews

jobs.description: Shopify Store Setup Brief Project: Shopify store build & integrations Deadline: April 26 (brand launch) Priority: Fast, clean execution. The brand content and imagery already exist — the goal is efficient implementation and optimisation, not brand development. Overview We are launching a new jewellery e-commerce store and require a Shopify specialist to build and optimise the store for launch on April 28. Brand direction, imagery, product descriptions, and copy will be provided. The focus of this role is technical setup, integrations, and ensuring a smooth customer experience from discovery to checkout. Speed and attention to detail are essential. Scope of Work 1. Shopify Store Setup Set up and configure the Shopify store including: Theme installation and configuration Homepage layout and navigation Collection structure Product page templates Mobile optimisation Checkout optimisation Policies and legal pages The goal is a clean, visually strong store that reflects a premium creative brand. 2. Product Setup Upload and configure products including: Product images Product descriptions (provided) Variants Pricing Inventory Collections Tags and categories Ensure the product architecture is clean and scalable for future releases. 3. Customer Experience Optimise the customer journey: Clear navigation Fast product discovery Optimised product pages Smooth checkout process Mobile-first experience This brand is visual and aesthetic, so layout and flow matter. 4. Reviews Integration Install and configure a review system including: Automated review requests Product review display Photo reviews if possible Import capability for future reviews Preferred tools may include: Judge.me Loox Yotpo 5. Loyalty Programme Implement a loyalty and rewards system to encourage repeat customers. Features should include: Points for purchases Referral rewards Birthday rewards VIP tiers (optional) Possible integrations: Smile.io LoyaltyLion 6. Email + Customer Data Connect email marketing and customer data collection. Tasks include: Email signup popups Customer segmentation Welcome email automation Abandoned cart flows Post-purchase emails Likely platforms: Klaviyo Shopify Email 7. Social Integrations Integrate the store with social platforms: Instagram shop connection Facebook shop connection Pinterest product sync TikTok integration (optional) Ensure products can be tagged and shoppable from social platforms. 8. Shipping Setup Configure shipping including: Domestic shipping rates International shipping options Shipping zones Tracking notifications Ensure shipping settings are clear, automated, and scalable. 9. Payment Gateways Set up payment systems including: Shopify Payments PayPal Apple Pay Google Pay Afterpay / Klarna (if appropriate) Checkout must be smooth and trustworthy. 10. Financial Integrations Set up financial tracking including: Tax configuration Sales reporting Accounting integration (e.g. Xero or QuickBooks) Ensure financial reporting is clean and accurate from day one. 11. SEO Basics Implement essential SEO: Meta titles Meta descriptions Image alt text Clean URLs Sitemap configuration This does not require deep SEO strategy — just correct foundational setup. 12. Apps & Integrations Recommend and install key Shopify apps including areas such as: Reviews Loyalty Email marketing Shipping Upsells Analytics Social proof The goal is a streamlined stack — not excessive plugins. 13. Analytics Setup Install and configure: Google Analytics Meta Pixel Pinterest Tag TikTok Pixel (optional) Ensure conversion tracking is functioning before launch. Deliverables Before launch the store must be: ✔ Fully functional ✔ Mobile optimised ✔ Integrated with marketing platforms ✔ Tested checkout process ✔ Shipping and payments working ✔ Apps and integrations installed ✔ Analytics tracking active Timeline Immediate start Target milestones: Week 1 • Store structure • Theme setup • Product upload Week 2 • Integrations • Shipping & payments • Testing Final days before launch • QA testing • Mobile optimisation • Final adjustments Launch date: April 28 Ideal Candidate Looking for someone who: Has strong Shopify build experience Understands premium visual brands Works efficiently under tight timelines Can recommend smart integrations Communicates clearly and proactively If possible, please include: Examples of Shopify stores you’ve built Estimated timeline Recommended tech stack
jobs.title: Shopify Expert for Quick Turnaround- new jewellery label

jobs.description: Job Description We are a fine jewelry brand specializing in solid gold and diamond pieces. We are looking for a designer to refine and replace non-product visuals across our Shopify website. Important: All product photography is complete. This role focuses only on homepage, about page, and supporting visual elements. Scope of Work Audit current website visuals and identify areas for improvement Replace homepage hero and supporting section images Improve About page with clean, editorial-style visuals Create a consistent system for backgrounds, textures, and banners Ensure visual consistency across desktop and mobile Visual Direction We are aiming for a minimal, luxury, and timeless aesthetic: Soft, natural lighting Neutral tones such as off-white, beige, and warm minimal palettes Clean and refined presentation Editorial feel similar to high-end jewelry brands Avoid: Generic or obvious stock photos Overly trendy or loud visuals Heavy text overlays or social-media-style graphics AI Usage AI tools such as Midjourney, DALL·E, and Adobe Photoshop are allowed and encouraged. However: Outputs must be realistic and aligned with a luxury brand Avoid artificial-looking faces or exaggerated visuals Do not alter or recreate product imagery AI should be used primarily for backgrounds, lifestyle scenes, and supporting visuals. Requirements Strong visual taste aligned with minimal and luxury aesthetics Experience with e-commerce websites, preferably Shopify Ability to source or generate high-quality imagery Understanding of visual hierarchy and brand consistency Nice to have: Experience with jewelry or fashion brands Basic familiarity with Shopify for implementation Deliverables Updated homepage visuals Updated About page visuals Supporting images such as banners, backgrounds, and textures Optional visual guideline for consistency Timeline Expected duration is 2 to 4 days. Fast turnaround is preferred. To Apply Please include: Portfolio, especially clean or luxury-style work Examples of websites you have visually improved Optional examples of AI-generated visuals Goal Elevate the website from a standard template feel to a premium, clean, and intentional luxury brand experience while maintaining simplicity and strong conversion performance.

jobs.description: Project: SEO-safe migration to a new Shopify theme (store from 2020, strong organic traffic) I run an established Shopify store launched in 2020. The store has: – Strong organic rankings and a lot of SEO equity – Ongoing Google Ads campaigns – An outdated layout / theme We’ve already prepared a new Shopify template (full redesign), but I absolutely cannot afford to lose organic traffic or rankings during the migration. I’m looking for a real SEO expert with deep Shopify experience, not a generic “I do SEO” freelancer. Your main goal: Plan and execute a safe migration to the new theme so that: – We do NOT lose organic traffic and key rankings – We IMPROVE technical SEO, speed, UX and conversion if possible – Google Ads tracking and conversion tracking remain fully functional Scope of work 1. Pre-migration SEO audit -Crawl of the current site (URLs, titles, meta descriptions, H1, internal links) -Check indexation, sitemaps, robots.txt, canonical tags -Identify top-performing pages (traffic, revenue, backlinks) that must be protected -Check current tracking setup (GA4, Google Ads, Google Tag Manager, GSC) 2. Migration strategy & mapping -Define clear SEO migration plan for switching to the new theme -Ensure URL structure stays the same where possible -Map any changed URLs and prepare 301 redirects if needed -Make sure on-page elements (titles, H1, content, schema, internal links) are preserved or improved 3. Implementation support -Work with my developer / team (or implement directly if you have dev skills) -Set up all necessary SEO settings in the new theme -Make sure Core Web Vitals, speed and mobile usability are optimized -Ensure proper setup of GA4 + Google Ads conversion tracking after migration 4. Post-migration monitoring & fixes -Monitor rankings, organic traffic and indexation in the first 4–8 weeks -Fix any 404 / crawling / indexing issues -Provide a short report with what was done and results What I’m looking for -Proven experience with SEO-safe Shopify redesigns / theme migrations -Solid technical SEO skills (crawling, redirects, canonicalisation, JS issues, Core Web Vitals) -Experience integrating SEO with Google Ads & analytics (GA4, GSC, GTM) -Excellent communication, clear step-by-step plan, no buzzword bullshit Must-have in your application Please apply ONLY if you can provide all of the below: -2–3 Shopify stores where you handled a redesign / theme migration. -Briefly describe what you did + attach screenshots from GA4 / -GSC showing traffic/rankings before & after the migration (even blurred is fine). -Explain in a few bullet points your standard SEO migration process for a Shopify theme change. -Tell me your estimated timeline (in weeks) and how you structure your work (phases). -Your hourly rate and whether you can also work on a fixed-price basis for a clearly defined scope. Bonus points if you: Have experience specifically with beauty eCommerce Can also advise on CRO (conversion rate optimization) and UX in the context of SEO. Please start your message with the word “SHOPIFY2020” so I know you actually read the description.
jobs.title: Senior Shopify SEO Specialist – Safe Theme Migration (2020 store, strong organic traffic)

jobs.description: Senior Shopify Developer — WooCommerce Migration + Booking + Product Configurator (11-week project) Fixed-price project €80,000–€10,000 Go-live: 15 June 2026 Expert level only 11 weeks Project overview onAqua (onaqua.eu) is Greece's leading premium water sports retailer — exclusive dealer for Fliteboard eFoils, Seabob, Awake Jetboards, Aquaglide, and Yamaha marine products. We operate an Aqua Park + eFoil rental + lessons business alongside an e-commerce catalogue of 400–500 SKUs. We need a senior Shopify developer to migrate our WordPress + WooCommerce store to Shopify, build a premium theme implementation (Impulse by Archetype Themes), integrate Sesami booking, set up ~14 Kickflip product configurator pages, and connect Greek market integrations (Viva Wallet, ACS, Skroutz, myDATA). What you will build Full WooCommerce → Shopify migration via Matrixify: ~400–500 products with metafields (speed, battery, wing size, weight), customers, orders, 500–1,000+ 301 redirects Impulse theme — premium customisation: video-first homepage, mega-menu, product configurator pages, brand landing pages (50+ brands), mobile-first UX matching fliteboard.com quality Sesami booking engine — 4 flows: Aqua Park tickets (60-min/day pass/Summer Camp), eFoil rental, Seabob rental, Fliteboard lessons (Beginner + Advanced) Kickflip product configurator — ~14 pages (/pages/configurator-[model]): Fliteboard ICON, PRO, ULTRA L3, AIR, Flitescooter, RACE, Marc Newson + Seabob F9/F9S/F5/F5S + Awake RÄVIK/RÄVIK3/RÄVIK S. Each: board → wing → battery → accessories with real-time price update Greek integrations: Viva Wallet payments + installments, ACS Courier live rates + labels, Skroutz Analytics feed, AADE myDATA e-invoicing Shopify Search & Discovery advanced filters: brand, sport type, battery life, wing size, price + Accentuate Custom Fields location pages Performance targets: LCP 2.5s, CLS 0.1, INP 200ms, mobile load 3s Project milestones (proposed — open to your input) Phase Duration Deliverable Payment 1 — Audit & setup Week 1–3 Migration brief approved, Shopify store live (password-protected), Sesami configured 30% 2 — Migration Week 4–8 100% products imported with metafields, 301 redirects live, bookings live, 14 Kickflip configurators 40% 3 — Design + QA Week 7–11 Impulse customisation approved by onAqua, QA checklist 100%, Lighthouse ≥70 mobile 20% 4 — Go-live Week 11 Store live at onaqua.eu, DNS cutover, handover documentation 10% Must-have skills do not apply without these: Shopify Liquid + OS 2.0 · Impulse theme · Matrixify or LitExtension for data migration · Sesami booking app · Kickflip or Custom Product Builder· WooCommerce → Shopify migration with metafields · 90%+ Job Success Score on Upwork Nice to have Experience with European / Greek e-commerce Viva Wallet, ACS, Skroutz, myDATA)— or willingness to research and implement with documentation Prior work on luxury / premium Shopify stores with high-value products €1,000+ Experience with efoil-riders.com or similar water sports / experience-based Shopify stores Eastern European timezone UTC+2 / UTC+3 — easier collaboration with onAqua Athens team Budget & engagement Total budget: €8,000–€10,000 fixed-price milestone-based Engagement: fixed-price project preferred over hourly predictable budget Timeline: 11 weeks from contract start — go-live 15 June 2026 non-negotiable, peak season After go-live: optional monthly retainer for support bug fixes, app updates, SEO monitoring — propose your terms Store will be created under onAqua's Shopify account — you receive Collaborator access only All code and configurations become onAqua's property upon final payment To apply, please answer these 3 questions in your proposal applications without answers will not be reviewed: 1 Have you done a WooCommerce → Shopify migration with metafields using Matrixify? Share a URL example. 2 Have you worked with Sesami booking app or Kickflip configurator? Describe the implementation. 3) Look at fliteboard.com — what would your approach be to replicate a similar premium UX using Impulse theme for onAqua?
jobs.title: Senior Shopify Developer — WooCommerce Migration + Booking + Product Configurator (11-week project)

jobs.description: We have developed a free Shopify app designed to help store owners improve user experience and performance. Key features include: Wishlist functionality Trust badges SEO optimization tools Page speed enhancements We are looking for experienced Shopify developers or agencies who actively manage client stores and are open to testing new tools that may benefit their clients. What You'll Do Install our free app on suitable client stores (with permission) Explore and test its features in real store environments Share feedback based on your experience and your client’s usage 💡 If your clients find the app useful, they are welcome to share their genuine feedback on the Shopify App Store. (This is completely optional and should always reflect their honest experience.) Requirements Currently managing at least 3 active Shopify stores Must have client approval before installing any app Proven Shopify experience (profile or portfolio) Strong communication with clients To Apply, Please Answer: How many active Shopify stores do you currently manage? Share 1–2 store URLs you’ve worked on recently How open are your clients to trying new apps/tools?
jobs.title: Shopify Developer Needed to Test Free App on Client Stores (Wishlist, SEO, Speed Tools)

jobs.description: I am seeking a highly capable Shopify growth partner or e-commerce team to help scale my brand, Treasured by You, into a profitable and well-structured business. Website: https://treasuredbyyou.com/ This store operates in the personalized gift space, with products designed for family members, loved ones, and special occasions. The store foundation has already been built, including the storefront, product listings, and shipping setup, and Klaviyo is currently being implemented. I am now looking for the right strategic partner to help take this from a built store to a profitable, scalable brand. My target is to reach $5,000–$8,000+ monthly profit within the next 6 to 8 months, and I am only interested in working with someone who is serious, efficient, and focused on results. I am not looking for guesswork, wasted time, or generic agency talk. I want a real strategy backed by experience. I need a partner or team that can evaluate the current store, identify weaknesses and opportunities, improve what is already built, and create a clear action plan for growth through both: Organic marketing Paid advertising across Meta, TikTok, Google, and other relevant channels I want a partner who understands not only how to generate sales, but how to do so profitably, with clear priorities and efficient execution. Scope of What I Need Full Shopify storefront and conversion review Recommendations for immediate improvements Launch strategy and next-step action plan Organic growth strategy Paid ad strategy and funnel planning Brand positioning and offer refinement Scaling plan focused on profitability Long-term growth partnership potential Compensation I am open to discussing a structure that includes base pay plus performance/commission incentives for the right partner, especially if you can show strong execution and results. As monthly profit increases, I am open to increasing incentives as well. To Apply Please send a serious proposal that includes: Your strategy for growing my store from its current stage What you would improve first and why What you would implement immediately What channels you would prioritize How you would approach achieving profitability within 6–8 months Relevant examples, case studies, or proof of past results I want substance, not fluff. Show me how you think, how you execute, and why you are the right fit to help build this into something meaningful and profitable. Only serious inquiries.
jobs.title: Shopify Growth Partner / E-Commerce Team Needed to Launch,Grow, Then Scale

jobs.description: Dear applicant, We are a growing dropshipping business looking for a reliable Shopify product lister for a long-term collaboration. This is a part-time remote role requiring approximately 1 hour per day. **Please answer the following questions when applying:** - Do you have experience working with Shopify and Poky? - Have you prepared products to be ready for advertising before? - Do you have experience with Google Sheets? - Have you used WhatsApp for communication? - Are you available for approximately 1 to 2 hours per day? **Requirements:** - Experience with Shopify (required) - Good English communication skills (required) - Comfortable working with Google Sheets (required) - Experience with workflows (required) - Experience with Poky (app) **Your duties will be:** - Preparing 6 products per day per store, ready to go live - Keeping the Google Sheet up to date with product status - Communicating with team members via Whatsapp and flagging any problems. A full workflow and video training are provided for every step of the process. We value hard-working team members and offer opportunities to grow within the team. If this sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you—please respond to this post. Best regards,
jobs.title: Shopify product lister (part-time, remote)

jobs.description: About Us We are a boutique design brand that is on a mission to make the world more colorful and inclusive. Our innovative products provide customers with an accessible option when it comes to sticky notes. Shopify Specialist Responsibilities • As the admin for our Shopify retail experience you are great at wearing multiple hats and execute when it comes to Shopify online experiences • Customize and maintain Shopify themes, ensuring the design communicates our brand’s commitment to inclusivity and accessibility • Implement accessibility features such as ARIA tags that reflect our mission of creating welcoming digital experiences • Translate our brand’s inclusive design philosophy into intuitive web experiences using Liquid coding • Manage plugins and platform functionality that align with our core values of diversity and user empowerment • Update and optimize site content (blogs, pages, images, copy) with language and design that represents our brand’s ethos • Demonstrate technical expertise while maintaining our brand’s unique visual and philosophical identity • Familiar with email funnels, specifically Klaviyo, to drive sales via email channels • Instantly experience a HUGE plus Requirements • 2+ years of experience with the Shopify platform • Proficiency in Liquid coding, HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript • Experience with theme customization that goes beyond technical implementation • Knowledge of accessibility standards (e.g., ARIA tags) • Portfolio showing technical skills and understanding of inclusive design principles • Strong ability to communicate how technical choices support brand mission How to Apply Portfolio Requirements • Submit a portfolio with at least 3-5 live Shopify store links you have developed or significantly customized Case studies that highlight: • Specific accessibility improvements • Theme customization examples • Performance optimization results • Responsive design implementations Candidates must demonstrate: • Experience working with minimum 5 Shopify stores • Proven track record in Shopify Partner Program • Understanding of inclusive design principles Technical proficiency in: • Liquid coding • Theme customization • Accessibility feature implementation Application Submission Checklist 1. Portfolio with live store links 2. Case studies 3. Shopify Partner Program profile 5. Rates and availability No Agencies. Please respond via Upwork and kindly ask that you do not email me directly.

jobs.description: We are building a premium car care brand called VELTIC – Swiss Premium Car Care and are looking for an experienced Shopify developer to implement a high-end, custom-designed Shopify store based on Figma designs. What we need: • Implementation of a custom Shopify store based on Figma • Pixel-perfect execution (spacing, typography, layout) • No “template look” – clean, minimal, premium feel • Mobile-first development • Fast loading speed and performance optimization • Clean structure for long-term scalability Pages to build: • Homepage (main focus) • Product pages • Collection / Shop page • About page • Contact page • Legal pages Design direction: • Minimal, clean, modern • Black / white / grey color palette • Strong focus on product visuals and typography • Premium automotive look (similar to brands like gyeon.co) • Use of subtle animations / interactions (hover effects, transitions), but not overdone Important: • We are not looking for basic theme customization • You should be able to build custom sections and layouts • Experience with premium / brand-focused stores is required What we expect from you: • Strong Shopify experience (custom builds) • Good understanding of design and attention to detail • Clear and reliable communication

jobs.description: Job Title: Luxury Pink E-commerce Website Designer for Hair Brand (Shopify Preferred) Job Description: I am looking for an experienced website designer to build a clean, modern, and luxury-style e-commerce website for my hair brand The brand focuses on glueless wigs and hair products etc . I want a high-end look with a black and pink aesthetic. Scope of Work: * Build a Shopify website (preferred) * Design homepage, shop page, and product pages * Upload initial products videos and pictures (wigs with variations: length, texture, bundles hair products ) * Set up payment integration (Shopify payments, Stripe or PayPal Etransfer karna r installmental payment) * Mobile-optimized design * Add policy pages ( Easy shipping, refund, installment plan) * Link Instagram page * Link WhatsApp and TikTok Design Style: * Clean, feminine, luxury aesthetic * Inspired by high-end beauty brands * Black, pink, and soft neutral tones * Easy to understand Additional Requirements: * Experience with e-commerce websites (beauty/hair brands preferred) * Strong UI/UX design skills * Ability to deliver within a good time frame Please Include in Your Proposal: * Portfolio of similar websites (especially beauty/fashion brands) * Estimated timeline * Total cost * Budget: Open to proposals (preferably mid-range quality work, not beginner level) Looking for someone creative who understands branding and can bring my vision to life.
jobs.title: Luxury E-commerce Website Designer for Hair Brand (Shopify Preferred)

jobs.description: I am looking for a high-level Shopify Expert to optimize my store (sarashka.fi) and fix significant traffic and conversion "leaks" in my current sales funnel. ​We are currently running Meta Ads with high Click-Through Rates, but we are seeing two major issues that need immediate technical and strategic fixes: ​The Loading Leak: 35–40% of users who click our ads drop off before the Landing Page loads. I need an expert to optimize site speed, compress assets, and ensure the mobile "In-App Browser" experience is seamless. I already have Microsoft clarity data which you can check if it helps. ​The Checkout Leak: We have a high "Initiate Checkout" rate, but a low final conversion rate. I need an audit and fix for our checkout flow, specifically optimizing for the finnish customers. ​Key Responsibilities: ​Speed Optimization: Improve Core Web Vitals and reduce "Time to Interactive" on mobile. ​CRO Audit: Review the product page and checkout flow to identify why users are abandoning at the final step. ​Technical Fixes: Optimize image sizes, remove unnecessary app scripts, and clean up theme code. ​Local UI/UX: Advise on/implement best practices for Finnish e-commerce (e.g., clear display of shipping costs, "Nouto" pickup visibility, and trust badges). ​Requirements: ​Proven track record of improving Shopify conversion rates (please provide case studies or stats). ​Deep understanding of Shopify Liquid code and Page Speed optimization. ​Experience with Meta Ads tracking (Pixel/CAPI) is a plus to ensure data accuracy. ​Bonus: Experience with the Finnish or Nordic e-commerce market and consumer behavior.
jobs.title: Shopify Performance & CRO Expert: Fix Drop-offs and Optimize for Finnish Market

jobs.description: 🛒 Shopify Store Setup – Custom Figma Design + AI Calculator 🇪🇺 EUROPEAN FREELANCERS ONLY. NO AGENCIES. We're looking for an experienced Shopify developer to build a fully functional store from scratch based on our existing Figma designs. What's included in the project: Custom theme development from Figma (pixel-perfect implementation) Full store setup: billing, shipping carriers, categories, filters, and checkout configuration 3-language support (multilingual store setup) 5-step custom product calculator with AI integration End-to-end handoff — we'll handle product uploads ourselves Timeline: 4 weeks (hard deadline) Budget: €1,000 fixed To apply, please attach examples of Shopify stores you've built (live links preferred). If there's a good fit, we'll schedule a short intro call to align on scope and timeline. Looking forward to connecting! 🚀
jobs.title: Custom Shopify Store Build | Figma Design, 3 Languages, AI Calculator | Fixed Budget
